arts.ttl: Henry reveals the one factor that could stop Barca winning the Champions League
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Thierry Henry has been full of praise for Hansi Flick’s side after their performance against Dortmund in the Champions League . But I still do think, with the high line, at times they can be a bit exposed.”

arts.ttl: Koeman: Barca aren’t ‘big favorites’ for Champions League
arts.sum: There are other teams that are playing at the same level: PSG, Arsenal, who I saw at the level of winning the Champions League. However, Koeman sees things a little differently and thinks PSG and Arsenal also need to be considered as genuine contenders.
